reasoning: Despite a high fidelity composite score, the identified concerns reveal significant functional defects, specifically the omission of the primary contact email and the failure to extract granular instructional text from the flowchart into the HTML body. Given that this is an agency onboarding document, the loss of specific guidance steps and contact information represents a failure in content preservation that exceeds the threshold for auto-approval.

action_items: Manually insert the missing contact email address into the primary contact section.
Convert the flowchart's instructional text and numbered lists into semantic HTML elements rather than relying on an image/alt-text summary.
Correct the reading order to follow the visual flow of the document.
